name: Vitality Enhancement
description: Allows all Helldivers to resist injury.

name: Stamina Enhancement
description: Increases all Helldivers' stamina capacity and recovery.

name: Hellpod Space Optimization
description: Squad members land with full ammo, grenades, and stims.

name: UAV Recon Booster
description: Increases minimap reveal radius for all Helldivers.

name: Localization Confusion
description: Delays enemy patrols calling in reinforcements.

name: Motivational Shocks
description: Allows all Helldivers to recover faster after being slowed by an attack.

name: Expert Extraction Pilot
description: Reduces the time the Pelican takes to arrive.

name: Experimental Infusion
description: Stim overcures, providing a short period of invulnerability.

name: Muscle Enhancement
description: Reduces movement penalty from difficult terrain.

name: Flexible Reinforcement Budget
description: Reduces time until new reinforcements are granted once they've been depleted.

name: Increased Reinforcement Budget
description: Increases the number of reinforcements available to the squad.

name: Firebomb Hellpods
description: Hellpod impact creates a fire explosion on landing.

name: Dead Sprint
description: Sprint speed increases when at low health.

name: Armed Resupply Pods
description: Resupply pods deal damage on impact.

name: Concealed Insertion
description: Squad is temporarily invisible after landing.

name: Sample Extricator
description: Increases sample carry capacity for all squad members.
